'''Chris Blythe''' is a comic-book colorist who worked on the [[Star Wars: Boba Fett (comic series)|''Boba Fett'' series]] and ''[[Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith]]'' as well as his extensive non–''Star Wars'' work with [[Wikipedia:2000 AD (comics)|''2000 AD'']] and [[Wikipedia:Judge Dredd|Judge Dredd]].

{{Artist-stub}}
